review:
AJ's Fine Foods is a grocery store you'll want to enjoy. I am the quintessential run in and out grocery shopper and even I find myself pursuing the aisles surprised and delighted by the items here. I think they shine in the bakery and prepared foods. Whenever I'm in a potluck pinch the prepared food here gets me out of it! 

They also have a terrific coffee with the loyalty program as well. You can enjoy your coffee and perhaps a baked good on their windowed patio so you can enjoy the sights without sweating it out. 

I tend to go to their patio to meet friends and we can all grab a bite or a drink of our choice without anyone having to concede to eat/drink something they don't want. You want coffee? No prob! Your friend wants sushi? Have at it! Want to grab a quinoa salad? They got that too!
